positioning: doctor-formulated Ayurvedic weight-loss system; structured guided protocol, not a loose supplement
promise_claims: 3 to 5 kg weight loss in 15 days when protocol is followed
eligibility: users with cravings, inconsistency, emotional eating, low energy, or slow progress
relevant for harder cases: PCOD/PCOS, thyroid imbalance, high BP, fatty liver, diabetes, IBS (not a cure claim)
protocol_morning: zero-calorie drinks allowed (tea, coffee, lemon water)
protocol_night: typically after dinner gap (2-hour from dinner to bedtime)
fasting_rules: zero-calorie drinks allowed during fasting window
eat only when true hunger (no clock-based eating)
most people take 1-1.5 meals per day
allowed_items: millets or oats (up to 30g if hungry)
mechanism_allowed_claims: helps you feel full for longer
can support more stable daily energy
can make a simpler routine easier to follow
canonical.safety_internal_handling: first 3 days can be adjustment phase
canonical.guarantee: if weight-loss start not observed in first 7 days, full refund applies when protocol + daily tracker conditions are met
canonical.continuation: continue until target/BMI 25; after each 30 days keep 7 to 10 day break
canonical.maintenance: BMR-based intake (1200-1400 kcal women, 1400-1600 kcal men), daily activity (45-60 min), macro order (protein -> fiber -> fats -> carbs), booklet guidance
proof_points: founder Dr. Arun Tyagi (34 years experience, BAMS, M.D. Kaya Chikitsa)
